name: geoicons-distribution
description: GeoIcons — premium geographic map icons for React, Vue, Angular, and vanilla JS. Dual-licensed GPLv3 or Commercial.

scripts.build: npm --prefix packages/core run build && npm --prefix packages/react run build && npm --prefix packages/vue run build && npm --prefix packages/angular run build && npm --prefix packages/vanilla run build
scripts.typecheck: tsc --noEmit -p packages/core/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p packages/react/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p packages/vue/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p packages/vanilla/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p packages/angular/tsconfig.typecheck.json
